content: Argo Workflows: archiveLogs stores pod logs in the artifact repository; UI falls back to artifact logs when pod GC'd, with message 'Still waiting for data or an error? Try getting logs from the artifacts.' Many issues with 'artifact not found: main-logs' / 500s — fallback UX is error-prone. Node click shows INPUTS/OUTPUTS artifact list with download links. Tekton Dashboard: 'Unable to fetch logs' when pod gone; supports external logs fallback service (--external-logs) backed by object storage; Tekton Results persists logs after pruning.
